trigger_library.name: Lead
trigger_library.desc: Triggers if in the Lead position list.

trigger_library.name: Reaction
trigger_library.desc: Triggers if in the Reaction position list.

trigger_library.name: Passive
trigger_library.desc: Triggers automatically at the start of the turn, without needing to be in a specific position.

trigger_library.name: Tie
trigger_library.desc: Triggers when this card ties in combat.

trigger_library.name: Survive
trigger_library.desc: Triggers when this card survives combat.

trigger_library.name: Combat
trigger_library.desc: Triggers whenever this card participates in combat, whether attacking or defending.
